blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,650 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 43".
